---
name: Feature request
about: Propose a new controller, metric, scenario, or benchmark feature
title: "[Feature] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ""
---

## Proposal

Describe the feature in one short paragraph.

## Why It Matters

Explain why this improves the benchmark rather than only adding surface complexity.

## Suggested Scope

- controller
- scenario
- metric
- visualization
- packaging
- documentation

## Evidence Plan

If this is implemented, what benchmark output should change to prove it matters?
